Field.Label: Value:
Field.Description: New numeric value (within the entity's min/max range as shown in Configure dialog)

Field.Label: Option:
Field.Description: Must exactly match one of the options shown in the Configure dialog

Field.Label: For locks that support latch-release (electric strike). Sends the OPEN command rather than LOCK/UNLOCK. Use only on devices whose YAML has supports_open=true.
Button Entity Key:
Field.Description: The numeric key of the button entity (find via Plugins -> ESPHome Bridge -> Dump All Entities to Log). Buttons are stateless; this triggers the button's on_press action on the device.
